source.entrypoint: Claude Code task in a dedicated repository worktree

taskResponse.conclusion: Implementation complete; validation is pending maintainer review.
nextActions: open PR and request AI review

commands.command: pnpm -s exec vitest run tests/example.test.ts --reporter dot

unresolvedRisks: Full build not run in producer session.

expectedNormalizedArtifacts.purpose: Preserve files touched, completed steps, unresolved risks, and next decisions.
Tell the producer or main agent that broader validation remains missing.
Normalize changed-file scope after the main agent validates the diff.
